parameter.name: responseVariable
parameter.description: The target variable in which the output of the operation will be stored

parameter.name: overwriteBody
parameter.description: Replace the Message Body in Message Context with the output payload of the operation

parameter.name: deadLetterReason
parameter.description: The reason for dead-lettering the message

parameter.name: deadLetterErrorDescription
parameter.description: The error description for dead-lettering the message
